info.name: AutoPulse - All Microservices
info.description: Comprehensive AutoPulse collection grouped by microservice and logical area. Default baseUrl points to the API Gateway.

item.name: Get Available Vehicles by Depot Query
Get Available Vehicle Summaries by Depot

request.description: Called by routing-service before VROOM optimization.
Loads depot and vehicles from fleet-service, couriers from user-service, routable parcels from parcel-service, enriches coordinates through geography-service, then calls VROOM.
Publishes planned routes to delivery-execution-service as delivery runs.
Normally called by routing-service when selecting a routing job.

item.name: List Runs by Courier and Date

item.description: Infrastructure endpoints useful while checking service registration. Notification service has Kafka consumers only and no business HTTP controller in this codebase.
